remaining_params.StackDescription: {p:You} puts two ingenuity counters on CARDNAME, then {p:You} may put an artifact card with mana value X or less from hand onto the battlefield, where X is the number of ingenuity counters on NICKNAME.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put two ingenuity counters on CARDNAME, then you may put an artifact card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield, where X is the number of ingenuity counters on NICKNAME.
